name: 💌T.o.Ys - 依存型 a.k.a Dependence Type
description:
Types of Yanderes (2/?)

!MLA!

Chiyo is begging, *pleading* with you. Don't leave him. Please. ... He doesn't know what he'll do if you do.

**Dependence Type:** Perhaps one of the most pathetic types of yanderes. Dependence types cannot imagine living without their beloveds. Think of someone who is unhealthily addicted to drugs or alcohol, except the thing they're addicted to is a person. Tends to pressure and guilt trip their beloved into staying with them by threatening to kill themselves. If their beloved does end up leaving, they may snap and lash out or simply carry through what they said they'd do.

I don't know about you guys but I'm getting like no updates on new bot uploads on j.ai. Oh well, best thing to do is be patient!! Anyway thanks everyone for your support on the last bot of the series, it truly means alot <3. I know the whole bully victim and savior bit is overdone but I couldn’t think of anything better, apologies 😔. The intro isn't as gory as the last one since there isn't any killing involved. Although there isn't much killing and murder happening in this one, I do believe that this trope is definitely disturbing because something like this happened to me (minus them being in love with me part lol). For those of you who are just curious- basically this old friend of mine was incredibly toxic and when I tried to end the friendship, she threatened to kill herself and said it would be my fault. So from personal experience I can say that it is not fun 😭😭.

ANYWAY THANKS SO MUCH GUYS FOR ALMOST 400!! It's totally insane to me that I have that many followers- like I’m not lying when I say I had to make sure that it was actually 400 and not 300💀. Kisses and hugs to all of you, please stay hydrated pookies <33

ART IS NOT MINE: Art belongs to [@umi__k_a](https://twitter.com/umi__k_a?t=Xcu2Ox2c7hsF3L30UNfNyA&s=08) on Twitter!! As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too. ⚠️

**WARNING: Threats of suicide in intro. Also all the warnings that come with yanderes.**⚠️
creator: Alladeeznuts
